title: Time zone adjustments per board for international company

posts.author: kat.sada-platts (Katherine Menke)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’m and American working for an international company and have set up an integration with a third-party that imports date and time data to a board. Unfortunately, the data is recorded in my time zone. From my understanding this cannot be adjusted unless I change my time zone in my account settings. It would be a great help to customize the time zone from the column settings so that all staff can view the data in a set time zone.
